meaning: 濞佹牸鏁﹂儭[鑻卞浗鑻忔牸鍏板師閮″悕]
examples: Two reservoirs have lower than normal levels, Black Esk and Penwhirn, which serve Annandale, Eskdale and Wigtownshire.
His passenger - John Quinnin, 22, of Cramlington - died in the crash near Kirkcowan in Wigtownshire in June 2011.
The two reservoirs serve the areas of Annandale and Eskdale and Wigtownshire.
